calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2015 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Plaintiff Jeffery R. Neubarth, Esq., appearing on his own behalf.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) SADAT MOUSA; an individual.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Plaintiff Jeffery R. Neubarth sworn and examinded on his own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff JEFFERY R. NEUBARTH, individually and dba LAW OFFICES OF JEFFERY R. NEUBARTH, PC. and against Defaulted Defendant(s) SADAT MOUSA, an individual as follows:

Damages: $50,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $0.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $50,000.00
Other: See attachment 7 to Judgment.

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2015 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-14-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2014 Continued To Apr-15-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
